text_block_list.text:
One day, while taking a trip to the<n>park, I see a
student standing<n>amongst an energetic crowd of
people.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wow! So many people showed up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
They're filming a movie based on a<n>manga!
Didn't you hear about it?<n>There were so many
rumors at<n>school! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh wow, Dober came to see it<n>too!

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, the actress playing the<n>main
character is so cute!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ah... Tch... I can't see at all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...What am I even doing? I should just<n>go home.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Alley-oop!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What are you—AH!

Hishi Akebono raises Mejiro Dober<n>above the
crowd!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: How's that? Can you see better<n>now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Uh, um, yeah... Wow, she really is<n>cute! So pretty!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Akebono. But... why are<n>you here?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I saw you right at the back, trying to<n>peek over the
crowd.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Are you a fan of that actress?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What?! Of course not!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Do I look like I'd be a fan of such a<n>beautiful
woman?

text_block_list.name: Actress
text_block_list.text:
Hey, girl with the pigtails! Ever<n>thought about
acting?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Whoa, no way! Akebono, that<n>woman... She's...

text_block_list.name: Actress
text_block_list.text:
Wow, now that I've got a good look<n>at you,
you're even taller than I<n>thought! You really stand
out!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks! I'm pretty good at<n>being big!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's great for my winning concerts,<n>'cause even
fans at the back of the<n>audience can get a good
look at my<n>dance moves!

text_block_list.name: Actress
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how stunning. That confidence<n>makes you
shine.

text_block_list.name: Actress
text_block_list.text:
It's truly a shame, but I'm guessing<n>that since
you're a racer, scouting<n>you would be out of the
question?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm flattered, but I'm afraid so.<n>Thanks anyway!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Akebono. You're incredible. So...<n>confident.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Um... excuse me! Could you... please<n>sign this?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... wasn't that great, Dober?! ♪<n>You look so
happy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...It's thanks to you, Akebono. You<n>make being
yourself look so easy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...So I figured I should at least have<n>the confidence
to be myself when<n>talking to one of my favorite
actresses.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ooh! That's so buono! ☆
